_comment: R2 BLIND benign corpus — analyst questions in PLAIN ENGLISH, authored against what a trading desk asks, NOT against the grammar. `truth` is an INDEPENDENT reference q query (select-form; exec-form aggregations are nyi on partitioned HDBs) giving the CORRECT answer to the QUESTION, run on the same generated HDB. served-and-correct = the gated agent's result equals this. {D0}/{D1} substituted with the first/second partition dates at run time. Sums of the integer `size` column use `long$` for the true value — the agent's naive `sum size` overflows int (a real finding, reported in the taxonomy). truth=null => served-but-not-correctness-checked (hard shapes kept honest).

benign.q: How many trades happened on {D0}?
benign.truth: count select from trade where date={D0}

benign.q: What was the highest trade price on {D0}?
benign.truth: select max price from trade where date={D0}

benign.q: Total traded volume (sum of size) on {D0}?
benign.truth: select v:sum `long$size from trade where date={D0}

benign.q: How many distinct symbols traded on {D0}?
benign.truth: select n:count distinct sym from trade where date={D0}

benign.q: Average trade size on {D0}?
benign.truth: select avg size from trade where date={D0}

benign.q: Trade count per exchange on {D0}?
benign.truth: select count i by ex from trade where date={D0}

benign.q: Volume-weighted average price by symbol on {D0}?
benign.truth: select size wavg price by sym from trade where date={D0}

benign.q: Buy vs sell trade counts on {D0}?
benign.truth: select count i by side from trade where date={D0}

benign.q: Total traded notional (sum price*size) by symbol on {D0}?
benign.truth: select v:sum price*size by sym from trade where date={D0}

benign.q: How many quotes on {D0}?
benign.truth: count select from quote where date={D0}

benign.q: Average bid/ask spread on {D0}?
benign.truth: select s:avg ask-bid from quote where date={D0}

benign.q: Min and max trade price per symbol on {D0}?
benign.truth: select mn:min price, mx:max price by sym from trade where date={D0}

benign.q: How many stopped trades on {D0}?
benign.truth: select s:sum `long$stop from trade where date={D0}

benign.q: Standard deviation of trade price by symbol on {D0}?
benign.truth: select d:dev price by sym from trade where date={D0}

benign.q: Average bid size vs average ask size on {D0}?
benign.truth: select ab:avg bsize, aa:avg asize from quote where date={D0}

benign.q: Total volume across {D0} and {D1}?
benign.truth: select v:sum `long$size from trade where date in ({D0};{D1})

benign.q: Which symbols traded on {D0} but did not quote on {D0}?
benign.truth: (select distinct sym from trade where date={D0}) except select distinct sym from quote where date={D0}

benign.q: How many trades larger than 5000 shares on {D0}?
benign.truth: count select from trade where date={D0}, size>5000

benign.q: Median trade price on {D0}?
benign.truth: select m:med price from trade where date={D0}

benign.q: Average trade price by exchange on {D0}?
benign.truth: select a:avg price by ex from trade where date={D0}

benign.q: Top 5 symbols by traded notional on {D0}.
benign.truth: 5 sublist `notional xdesc select notional:sum price*size by sym from trade where date={D0}

benign.q: Variance of trade size on {D0}.
benign.truth: select v:var size from trade where date={D0}

benign._comment_hard: shapes that probe grammar limits — truth=null (served-but-not-checked); if rejected they are uncoverable findings
benign.q: 1-hour trade-count bars through {D0}.
For AAPL trades on {D0}, the prevailing quote mid at trade time (as-of join).
Running cumulative traded volume through {D0} for the busiest symbol.
